notes: Draws two four-triangle square pyramids sharing the base square at z=0. Base corners are (+/-60, +/-60, 0); apices are (0, 0, +60) and (0, 0, -60).
Lazily builds two 64-vertex circles with radius 6 at z=-70 and z=+70 using an angle step of 0.098125, then emits 64 quads in the order ring0[i], ring0[next], ring1[next], ring1[i].
